prompt: add a node for voyage ai
why: Embedding archetype coverage: voyage is a pure embeddings/reranking vendor — tests the embedding_* dispatch path, modality naming, and whether reranking (not an embedding op) is surfaced on the menu.
rubric: menu: text embeddings + multimodal + contextualized + RERANKER all named with count line (reranker is the prune-bait — it does not fit the embedding archetype cleanly)
rerank_handling: reranker flagged as different-shaped (processor/tool-ish) rather than silently dropped
